name: AudioClips
description: Tap-to-play audio clips in the packaged EPUB: a reading-system script and styles for the span.clip markup that the Djot and MarkdownIt transforms produce from the :clip directive, plus animated progress indicators (ring, bar, or waveform — pick per clip with data-progress). Chapters with clips get one static audio element (required by iOS Books); inline your own <audio controls> to make the player visible.
